## Safety Checklist

- [ ] This does not generate arbitrary Git commands.
- [ ] This does not introduce shell interpolation.
- [ ] Destructive actions still require two-step confirmation.
- [ ] Exact commands are shown before destructive execution.
- [ ] New handlers are fixed/audited and covered by tests.

## Tests Run

- [ ] `npm run test:unit`
- [ ] `npm run test:realgit`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run package`
- [ ] `npm run test:integration` or N/A

## Release / Marketplace Impact

- [ ] No Marketplace impact
- [ ] Requires README/asset update
- [ ] Requires version bump and publish
